title: Get the form and submit your passport renewal in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Online passport renewal is now available
You may be able to renew your passport online if you need it in 20 business days or more.
We’re currently accepting a limited number of online applications each day.
Renew a passport in Canada

## Get the form and submit your application
Where are you right now? Canada | US | Outside Canada and the US

## Choose how you want to renew to get the right form
Available for a limited number of people
- Apply online with a digital photo taken by a commercial photographer.
- Get your passport in 20 business days , plus mailing time.
- Your current passport will be cancelled when you apply.
Get your passport mailed to you in 10 or 20 business days , depending on the location.
You can get faster processing at passport offices and certain Service Canada Centres. You may need to show proof of travel. Extra fees apply
Get your passport in 20 business days , plus mailing time.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
